overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The player crosses a busy street with retro-futuristic vehicles, passes pedestrians, and continues along sidewalks surrounded by towering glass buildings, holographic advertisements, and elevated pedestrian walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with marked crosswalk

events.description: white retro-futuristic car drives past from right to left across the crosswalk
green compact car passes from left to right in front of the camera
passing through group of pedestrians crossing the street, moving from road to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk through a futuristic city intersection, navigating between vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white vintage-style car with red stripes driving across the intersection
person in bright colorful jacket and green pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow parallel lines painted on dark asphalt
elevated walkway structure with glass sides spanning across the street between buildings
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon accents rising into the night sky
building facade covered in bright holographic advertisements and glowing signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the camera crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. A white retro-futuristic car passes by, followed by a green vehicle, while pedestrians in cyberpunk attire walk through the intersection. Towering glass buildings with neon signage frame the scene, and an elevated pedestrian bridge is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk alongside tall concrete building with palm tree

events.description: transitioning from open intersection onto narrow sidewalk with large concrete wall on left
palm tree trunk and fronds temporarily obscure the view of the street on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a tall concrete wall, passing a palm tree and approaching the overhead bridge

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete building facade with horizontal lines and mounted light fixtures
tall palm tree with thick trunk and spreading fronds situated between sidewalk and street

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrower sidewalk bordered by a massive concrete wall on the left and a street with sparse traffic on the right. A palm tree stands prominently near the curb. The elevated pedestrian bridge grows larger in the distance as the camera advances, and the environment feels more enclosed compared to the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner with glass building approaching busy intersection with overhead walkways

events.description: passing the corner where concrete wall ends and modern glass building facade begins
slight turn to the right while approaching the intersection, revealing more of the cross street

agents.ego_description: walking past the glass building corner toward a busy intersection with overhead pedestrian bridges and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: modern building with reflective glass facade and red neon signage showing 'TF-28' or similar characters
short metal bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrian and vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: The camera rounds a corner where a modern glass building with reflective windows and red neon signage replaces the concrete wall. The overhead pedestrian bridge now looms closer overhead, and the street opens into a busier intersection with multiple lanes of traffic and bright holographic billboards. The environment transitions from enclosed sidewalk to a more open urban plaza feel as the camera approaches the cross street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, bustling city intersection into a confined urban corridor that eventually opens back up into a vibrant plaza. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst retro-futuristic cars and pedestrians, framed by towering glass buildings and neon signage. As the camera advances, the space narrows into a sidewalk bordered by a massive concrete wall and a solitary palm tree, while an elevated pedestrian bridge grows larger in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera rounds a corner, replacing the concrete wall with a reflective glass building adorned with red neon. Finally, the environment expands once more as the overhead bridge looms closer and the path opens into a busy intersection filled with multiple lanes of traffic and bright holographic billboards.
